title: US Secret Service, UK and Canada launch Operation Atlantic targeting crypto approval phishing scams
message_html: US Secret Service, UK and Canada launch Operation Atlantic targeting crypto approval phishing scams ...
snippet: The U.S. Secret Service is participating in a multinational operation targeting crypto approval-phishing scams.

title: Bithumb, South Korea's second-largest crypto exchange, fined ₩36.8 billion and suspended for AML violations
message_html: Bithumb, South Korea's second-largest crypto exchange, fined ₩36.8 billion and suspended for AML violations ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Bithumb, South Korea’s second-largest crypto exchange, was fined ₩36.8 billion and received a six-month partial business suspension by the Financial Intelligence Unit for violations of the country’s AML law, involving about 6.65 million compliance breaches.
